notes: v0.16.73 — Two big fixes. (1) RIFT ENCOUNTER LIVES — every rift node mode (CORE DEFENCE / CHAIN LINKS / OVERLOAD GRID) now gives you 3 lives per encounter. Dying respawns you with full HP after a brief death pause. Spending all 3 fails the encounter, which then consumes 1 of your main rift hearts via the existing finalize flow. This also fixed a CHAIN LINKS bug where the player couldn't actually die at 0 HP — damage was bypassing the proper take_damage path. Three heart pips drawn above the centre objective show remaining encounter lives. (2) SPLITTER MINI-BOSS BUFF — main HP × 1.7 (was dying in seconds before triggering its wave thresholds). Sub-splitters now have 10 HP (was 1) and take damage from player bullets so you can actually shoot them down. Sub-splitter bullets last 4.0 s (was 1.6 s default) at 320 speed (was 240) so they actually reach the player across a normal arena. Sub fire cadence 1.4 s → 0.9 s. Windows only.
